questionHtml: Determine from the graph the rate of reaction at 20 s, in cm3 s−1, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
tangent drawn to curve at t = 20 s  [✔]

slope/gradient calculation  [✔]

0.35 «cm3 s–1»  [✔]

 

Note: Accept values in the range 0.32–0.42 «cm3 s–1».

meta.title: Determine from the graph the rate of reaction at 20 s, in cm3 s−1, showing your working.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
